title: helianthemum alpestre var. italicum
intro: Helianthemum alpestre var. italicum, also known as Rockrose or Italian Mountain Rose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Rockrose plant has been linked to various health benefits, including wound healing, antiseptic properties, and potential antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support skin health and immune system function.
